# AI-hint: GENERATED Quadlet pod for the co-resident group 'mios-ai' (WS-7 pods-as-SSOT). DO NOT EDIT -- regenerate via tools/generate-pod-quadlets.py from [pods.mios-ai] in mios.toml. Members (6): mios-llm-light, mios-cpu-node, mios-llm-worker@, mios-llm-heavy, mios-pgvector, mios-open-webui.
# AI-related: usr/share/mios/mios.toml, tools/generate-pod-quadlets.py, mios-llm-light.container, mios-cpu-node.container, mios-llm-worker@.container, mios-llm-heavy.container, mios-pgvector.container, mios-open-webui.container
# /usr/share/containers/systemd/mios-ai.pod
# Consolidated AI pod.
# Members (each member .container declares Pod=mios-ai.pod):
#   mios-llm-light
#   mios-cpu-node
#   mios-llm-worker@
#   mios-llm-heavy
#   mios-pgvector
#   mios-open-webui
[Unit]
Description='MiOS' AI pod (inference, heavy, data, ui)
After=network-online.target mios-gateway-agent.service
Wants=network-online.target mios-gateway-agent.service

[Pod]
PodName=mios-ai
Network=host

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target default.target
